title: [Cobblemon] Wallpapers Plus!
description: Adds multiple wallpapers to Cobblemon, both from the games, the community, and the card game!
body:
Want some beautiful new Wallpapers for your PC? Of course you do! Wallpapers Plus aims to add a plethora of new wallpapers for all your organizing needs!

The second update brings 85 _brand new_ wallpapers to the original 33, bringing the total number of wallpapers to a whopping 118, with more to come! Many of the wallpapers include alternative styles, with many shown in the gallery!

Note: It's important to load the resource pack on the title screen _before_ joining the world you want to use the wallpapers with, otherwise the pack won't work!


Thinking of starting a Cobblemon server with friends? Consider Sparked Host! And then while you're at it consider using my affiliate code "Trilo" for a healthy 25% off! And THEN, have fun!!!! [Get your server here!](https://sparkedhost.com/?utm_source=3114&utm_medium=affiliate)

![25% off SparkedHost Minecraft Server when you use code "Trilo"!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3815b21354db7dd9d3901095020aa4d3bae35b6c.webp)
